title: Gothic II: Gold Edition
notes: The exactly same issues as with Gothic. Game starts correctly but then always crashes after 1-2 minutes of gameplay. Missing sound files or memory access violation errors occur. Unplayable.
No cutscene videos, less than fantastic performance. Was still able to play with default settings.
title: Gothic II: Gold Edition

notes: Starts with a black windowed screen, I can hear sound, and then the window goes crazy trying to go fullscreen until it eventually crashes.
title: Gothic II: Gold Edition

notes: It works after disabling the music in file Gothic.ini (musicEnabled=0). This file gets restored to its default values each time you close the game, so you need to load a backup of the modified file before launching the game.
title: Gothic II: Gold Edition

notes: videos play just sound, menu not shown, just black screen. switching between window and fullscreen mode every second. after some time stays in window mode. window stays in foreground and makes using the system impossible. i have to ssh into the system and kill -9 the process
title: Gothic II: Gold Edition

cpu: AMD A4-6210 APU with AMD Radeon R3 Graphics
notes: trying with proton 3.7-8 and 3.16-4b the intro worked and even loading the main menu. fiddled around with protontricks vcrun2008/2010 overrides and gothic.ini as well, with no luck. worked ootb with native wine 3.0.3-2 though.
title: Gothic II: Gold Edition

notes:
Works after some tweaking:
-winetricks directmusic + remove the override for 'dsound' (winecfg -> Libraries)
-changed:
extendedMenu=0
to
extendedMenu=1 
in gothic.ini to enable 1920x1080 and 2560x1440 resolution (cosmetic)
After that played the game for a few hours. No crashes and good performance.
title: Gothic II: Gold Edition

notes: I was able to make it work well by tweaking directmusic and dsound as explained in the comment below. To get rid of the annoying change between the windowed and fullscreen mode during the movie playback I had to set my desktop resolution manually in Gothic.ini file. After that it works rather well.
title: Gothic II: Gold Edition

notes: Runs out-of-the box, except for cut scenes (there are only a few though) and resolutions. Need to install Systempack to fix both. Performance is not good though (25-35 FPS in Khorinis) and I cannot get the d3d11 mod to work.
